results.title: Fuel Prices Rise Again; Petrol, Diesel Costlier by Up to 94 Paise Per Litre
results.description: New Delhi: Petrol and diesel prices were increased once again across major metropolitan cities on Saturday, marking the third hike in less than 10 days amid continued volatility in global crude oil markets. results.title: US Lawmakers Condemn Trump Over ‘Racist’ Remarks on Indian Americans
results.description: A group of eight US lawmakers has introduced a resolution condemning US President Donald Trump over what they described as “racist rhetoric” targeting Indian and Chinese American communities. The resolution was led by Representatives Raja Krishnamoorthi , Ted Lieu and Pramila Jayapal , with five other lawmakers extending their support. The move comes amid growing criticism of remarks shared by Trump on social media. The lawmakers took strong objection to a post made by Trump on April 22 on his platform Truth Social, where he shared comments by radio host Michael Savage on birthright citizenship in the United States . In those remarks, immigrants from countries like India and China were accused of misusing the system. The resolution criticised such statements and stressed that immigrants from diverse backgrounds play a vital role in shaping the strength and future of the United States. According to the lawmakers, such rhetoric is harmful and does not reflect the values of inclusion and diversity that the country stands for. The controversy also drew a response from India’s Ministry of External Affairs, which termed the remarks as “uninformed, inappropriate and in poor taste,” without directly naming Trump or the radio host. The ministry further stated that such comments do not represent the true nature of India -US relations, which are built on mutual respect and shared interests. The resolution is seen as a political message against divisive language and a show of support for immigrant communities in the United States. More developments in the matter are expected as discussions continue. Also Read: US Weighs Partial Sanctions Relief for Iran Oil as Talks Continue; India Could Gain

results.title: India News | Nashik TCS Case: 1500-page Chargesheet Filed in Alleged Harassment, Religious Conversion Probe
results.description: Get latest articles and stories on India at LatestLY. In a major development in the Nashik TCS case, police have filed a 1500-page chargesheet in one of the first FIRs registered in connection with allegations of molestation, sexual harassment, and attempted religious conversion. The case has triggered nine FIRs and a Special Investigation Team (SIT) probe due to its seriousness.
